Be specific  what step caused problems? What error messages did you see?
column7:
6. What would make this app more useful for you? (Long answer, Required)
Features, UI changes, anything that would improve your experience.
column8: 7. On a scale of 1-5, how likely are you to use this for real business payments? (Linear scale, Required)

column6: No, nothing was confusing or unclear instead every step of process find easy and simple.
column7: It's features and UI make this app more useful for me and also felt useful for real business payments.

column6: The process was mostly smooth. Initially, I was slightly unsure about the fund locking step, but it became clear after trying once. No major errors encountered.
column7: Adding a small guide or tooltip for first-time users would make it even better. Also, a transaction history section would be helpful.

column6: There was minor confusion during wallet connection due to permissions, but it worked after retrying. The rest of the flow was smooth and understandable.
column7: A clearer wallet connection guide and loading indicators would improve the experience. Overall UI is good.

column6: Since I didn’t have the wallet installed, I couldn’t complete the flow, but the UI itself was easy to navigate and understand.
column7: Add a demo mode or preview option for users without wallets. That would make it more accessible.

column6: Everything was quite intuitive. No major confusion, just a slight delay during transaction confirmation which could be clarified with a status message.
column7: Real-time transaction status updates and better feedback messages would enhance user confidence.
